name: test_put_update_user[TC_USR_PUT_001-data0]
description:
PUT /users/{id} — parametrized across 3 full-replacement scenarios.
        Verifies status 200, name/job match exactly, updatedAt present,
        and schema compliance for each case.

        Test cases: TC_USR_PUT_001 → TC_USR_PUT_003
descriptionHtml:
PUT /users/{id} — parametrized across 3 full-replacement scenarios.
    Verifies status 200, name/job match exactly, updatedAt present,
    and schema compliance for each case.

    Test cases: TC_USR_PUT_001 → TC_USR_PUT_003
statusMessage:
AssertionError: [TC_USR_PUT_001] PUT — update name and job for user 2
    Expected 200, got 429
assert 429 == 200
 +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
statusTrace:
